title: Sonic jammer
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Jammer}} {{Device |image=[[File:Sonic.jpg]] |name=Sonic jammer |manufacturer= |model= |type= |culture=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]][[Star Wars (1977) 13|''Star Wars'' (1977) 13]] |creators= |created= |modifier= |destroyed= |discovered= |owners=[[Ship-dweller]]s |locations= |cost= |value= |structure= |size= |material= |length= |width= |height= |weight= |protection= |capacity= |range= |inscription= |markings= |purpose=Disrupting [[Starship/Legends|starship]] systems |heritage= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Y-you're still '''wreckers!''' This is how '''my''' ship was brought down!''"
"''Yours... and '''all others''' that stray into the Drexel system.|Luke Skywalker and Governor Quarg|}} A '''sonic jammer''' was a tool used as a weapon by [[Quarg]]'s [[Quarg's father|father]], a well-known pirate who was defeated by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. With a group of jammers spread throughout the [[Korteen asteroid belt]], he wrecked passing ships and tore them apart for salvage. The Old Republic eventually ran him off, and he fled to [[Drexel (star)|Drexel]]. Once there, while using the jammer to draw starships to the surface so that the pirates could salvage their metals, he discovered that the devices affected the hearing of the [[Sea-dragon]]s, and he tried to defeat the [[Dragon Lords]] by using the jammers on their mounts. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] destroyed the devices, allowing the dragons and Dragon Lords to defeat Quarg. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 13|''Star Wars'' (1977) 13]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 13}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 14|''Star Wars'' (1977) 14]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 14}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 15|''Star Wars'' (1977) 15]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 15}} {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Countermeasures]]
